title: randia portoricensis
intro: Randia portoricensis, also known as Puerto Rican Randia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Puerto Rico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Randia portoricensis include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared as an infusion, tea, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat ailments such as sore throats, coughs, and colds.
